markdownRemark.html:
Product Engineer — 30-Day Feasibility Report

Date: 2026-04-24 | Analyst: Product Engineer | Source: Trend Scout 2026-04-24

1. AI SEO Content Agent (SeoBOT Clone)

A. What is it? An AI-powered SEO agent that autonomously researches keywords, generates optimized blog posts, manages programmatic SEO (pSEO) pages, and deploys mini-apps — all through a dashboard. SeoBOT is at $73,038 MRR with 7% growth, proving the market pays for hands-off SEO.

B. 30-day verdict: YES Core product is keyword research API + LLM content gen + CMS publish. All three are commoditized. Differentiation is in the autonomous loop (crawl → analyze → write → publish → monitor).

C. Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Next.js 15 + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
  • Backend: Node.js (Hono) on Fly.io
  • Database: Supabase (Postgres + pgvector for content similarity)
  • Infra: Cloudflare Workers for edge pSEO pages
  • AI APIs: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini ($0.15/1M input) for content, Claude Haiku for analysis

D. OSS Dependencies

Name Purpose License
Next.js Dashboard UI MIT
Hono API server MIT
Supabase DB + auth Apache 2.0
sitemap.js sitemap generation MIT

E. 30-Day Sprint Plan

  • Week 1: Keyword research pipeline (Google Suggest API + competitor scraping). Supabase schema. Auth + onboarding.
  • Week 2: Content generation engine (prompt templates, SEO scoring, internal linking). CMS integrations (WordPress REST API, Webhook for static).
  • Week 3: pSEO page generator (template system, bulk create, sitemap). Rank tracking via SerpAPI. Dashboard v1.
  • Week 4: Stripe billing. Email reports. Landing page. Beta launch on Product Hunt + Indie Hackers.

F. Monthly Costs at 1K Users

Item Cost
AI APIs (GPT-4o-mini ~500K requests) $75
SerpAPI (1K searches/day) $50
Supabase Pro $25
Fly.io (2 shared-cpu-2x) $34
Cloudflare Workers (pSEO) $5
Total ~$189/mo

G. Revenue Model

Tier Price Target
Starter $29/mo 50 articles/mo
Growth $79/mo 200 articles + pSEO
Agency $199/mo Unlimited + white-label

Conversion: ~4% free→paid. Time to $1K MRR: ~3 months at 250 free users with 4% conversion.

H. Top 3 Risks + Mitigation

  1. Google algo penalty for AI content → Mix AI + human editing workflow; focus on pSEO (data-driven pages, not pure prose)
  2. SerpAPI cost at scale → Build lightweight SERP scraper as fallback; cache aggressively
  3. SeoBOT has head start → Compete on price + specific vertical (e.g., e-commerce SEO only)

I. Verdict: BUILD ✅ Clear market, proven MRR, achievable stack, 30 days to MVP.

2. AI Sales DM Agent (DM Champ Clone)

A. What is it? An AI agent that engages prospects via Instagram DM, WhatsApp, and Messenger, qualifies leads, handles objections, and books calls or closes deals. DM Champ: $187,492 MRR, white-label available. This is a pure conversational AI API play.

B. 30-day verdict: PARTIAL Core DM chatbot is buildable. White-label system + multi-channel + CRM integrations stretch past 30 days for production quality.

C. Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React + Vite + Tailwind
  • Backend: Python (FastAPI) — needed for LangChain/LangGraph agent logic
  • Database: Supabase
  • Infra: Railway (Python-friendly)
  • AI APIs: GPT-4o ($2.50/1M input) for conversations, Claude for lead scoring

D. OSS Dependencies

Name Purpose License
LangGraph Agent state machine MIT
FastAPI API server MIT
Instagram Private API DM integration GPL-3.0 ⚠️
whatsapp-web.js WhatsApp integration Apache 2.0

E. 30-Day Sprint Plan

  • Week 1: LangGraph agent with sales conversation flow. WhatsApp integration via whatsapp-web.js. Lead qualification prompt engineering.
  • Week 2: Instagram DM integration. CRM webhook (HubSpot/Close). Conversation analytics dashboard.
  • Week 3: Agent training interface (upload FAQs, pricing docs). Objection handling library. Multi-language support.
  • Week 4: Stripe billing. White-label config (logo, brand voice). Landing page. Limited beta.

F. Monthly Costs at 1K Users

Item Cost
AI APIs (GPT-4o ~1M messages) $500
Railway (4 vCPU, 8GB) $40
Supabase Pro $25
Phone numbers (Twilio) $50
Total ~$615/mo

G. Revenue Model

Tier Price Target
Starter $49/mo 500 conversations/mo
Pro $149/mo Unlimited + CRM integrations
Agency $399/mo White-label + 5 brands

Conversion: ~3% (higher ACV). Time to $1K MRR: ~2 months (fewer users needed at higher price).

H. Top 3 Risks + Mitigation

  1. Instagram/WhatsApp API bans → Use official Business API only; rate limit aggressively; warm up accounts slowly
  2. High AI cost per conversation → Use GPT-4o-mini for initial messages, escalate to GPT-4o only for hot leads
  3. Sales prompt quality makes or breaks it → Hire 2-3 sales reps to train the agent; test against real conversations before launch

I. Verdict: BUILD ✅ (launch single-channel WhatsApp MVP in 30 days, expand later)

3. AI Short Video Generator (Vid.AI Clone)

A. What is it? Script-to-video AI: user provides a topic or script, system generates voiceover, visuals, captions, and edits into a vertical short (TikTok/Reels/Shorts). Vid.AI at $95,064 MRR proves people pay for this. Trending AI Short Video Engine (6.3k ⭐) shows OSS demand.

B. 30-day verdict: PARTIAL Basic version (text → TTS → stock footage → captions) is 30-day doable. Advanced features (AI avatars, custom branding, multi-scene) need more time.

C. Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Next.js 15 + shadcn/ui + video preview player
  • Backend: Node.js (Hono) + BullMQ for job queue
  • Database: Supabase
  • Infra: Fly.io + Cloudflare R2 (video storage)
  • AI APIs: ElevenLabs TTS ($0.18/1K chars), Minimax/Hailuo for video gen, DALL-E 3 for thumbnails

D. OSS Dependencies

Name Purpose License
FFmpeg.wasm Browser-side video composition LGPL-2.1
Remotion Programmatic video creation MIT
BullMQ Job queue for video processing MIT

E. 30-Day Sprint Plan

  • Week 1: Script parser → scene breakdown logic. TTS pipeline (ElevenLabs). Stock footage API integration (Pexels).
  • Week 2: Remotion video composition (captions, transitions, music). FFmpeg server-side rendering. Job queue with progress tracking.
  • Week 3: Template library (5-8 styles: talking head, listicle, story). Caption styling engine. Video preview in browser.
  • Week 4: Stripe billing. Export to MP4. Landing page with demo video. Launch.

F. Monthly Costs at 1K Users

Item Cost
ElevenLabs TTS (~50M chars) $200
Minimax video gen (~10K clips) $150
Cloudflare R2 storage $15
Fly.io (render workers) $60
Supabase Pro $25
Total ~$450/mo

G. Revenue Model

Tier Price Target
Creator $19/mo 10 videos/mo
Business $49/mo 50 videos + custom branding
Agency $149/mo 200 videos + API access

Conversion: ~5% (visual product = high conversion). Time to $1K MRR: ~2 months.

H. Top 3 Risks + Mitigation

  1. Rendering time kills UX → Use BullMQ + WebSocket progress; render 30s preview first, full render async
  2. Video quality gaps vs competitors → Focus on one vertical (e.g., educational shorts) and nail it rather than competing on general quality
  3. AI video gen costs scale fast → Cache common assets; use stock footage + Ken Burns as default, AI gen only for premium

I. Verdict: BUILD ✅ (MVP with stock footage + TTS + captions in 30 days; AI video gen as premium add-on)

4. AI LinkedIn Outreach Agent (Prosp Clone)

A. What is it? AI that automates LinkedIn prospecting: finds leads via search filters, sends personalized connection requests and follow-ups, responds to replies, and books meetings. Prosp at $128,005 MRR. Pure AI API + browser automation play.

B. 30-day verdict: YES LinkedIn outreach tools are well-understood. The AI differentiator is hyper-personalized messages based on profile analysis. Stack is straightforward.

C. Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Next.js 15 + shadcn/ui
  • Backend: Node.js (Hono)
  • Database: Supabase
  • Infra: Fly.io
  • AI APIs: GPT-4o-mini for message personalization, Claude Haiku for profile analysis

D. OSS Dependencies

Name Purpose License
Playwright LinkedIn browser automation Apache 2.0
linkedin-api-client Profile data extraction MIT
BullMQ Campaign scheduling MIT

E. 30-Day Sprint Plan

  • Week 1: LinkedIn auth + session management via Playwright. Profile scraper (extract: role, company, recent posts, interests). Lead search filters.
  • Week 2: AI personalization engine (analyze profile → generate message). Campaign builder (sequence: connect → wait → message → follow-up). Safety limits (daily caps, delays).
  • Week 3: Reply detection and AI response. Calendar booking integration (Cal.com). Analytics dashboard (sent, accepted, replied, booked).
  • Week 4: Stripe billing. Campaign templates library. Landing page. Beta with 20 users.

F. Monthly Costs at 1K Users

Item Cost
AI APIs (GPT-4o-mini ~2M calls) $300
Proxy service (Bright Data) $200
Fly.io $34
Supabase Pro $25
Total ~$559/mo

G. Revenue Model

Tier Price Target
Starter $39/mo 100 leads/mo
Growth $89/mo 500 leads + AI replies
Enterprise $249/mo Unlimited + team + analytics

Conversion: ~4%. Time to $1K MRR: ~2.5 months.

H. Top 3 Risks + Mitigation

  1. LinkedIn bans/throttles → Strict rate limits (40 actions/day max); human-like delays; rotate session fingerprints
  2. Proxy costs eat margins → Offer limited tier with user's own LinkedIn session; premium tier includes managed proxies
  3. Message quality = everything → A/B test 50+ templates; use recent post content for personalization hooks

I. Verdict: BUILD ✅ Proven MRR, achievable stack, clear differentiation via AI personalization.

5. White-Label AI Dashboard for Agencies (ChatDash Clone)

A. What is it? A white-label dashboard that agencies can brand as their own, providing AI chatbot + analytics + lead capture for their clients. ChatDash at $47,369 MRR, 24% growth. Agencies resell it at 3-5x markup. Pure AI API wrapper with multi-tenancy.

B. 30-day verdict: YES White-label AI chatbot dashboards are fundamentally CRUD + AI API + tenant management. No complex ML, no browser automation, no video rendering. Straightforward SaaS.

C. Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Next.js 15 + Tailwind + shadcn/ui
  • Backend: Node.js (Hono)
  • Database: Supabase (Row Level Security for multi-tenant)
  • Infra: Fly.io
  • AI APIs: GPT-4o-mini for chat, Claude Haiku for analytics summaries

D. OSS Dependencies

Name Purpose License
Next.js Dashboard + embeddable widget MIT
Supabase Auth + multi-tenant DB Apache 2.0
Embeddable chat widget Client-facing widget MIT

E. 30-Day Sprint Plan

  • Week 1: Multi-tenant Supabase schema. Auth with agency/client hierarchy. Embeddable chat widget (React component).
  • Week 2: AI chat engine with per-client knowledge base (upload docs → chunk → vector store → RAG). Conversation logging. White-label config (logo, colors, greeting).
  • Week 3: Analytics dashboard (conversations, lead capture, satisfaction score). Lead export (CSV, webhook). Agency admin panel.
  • Week 4: Stripe connect (agency billing). Widget install script generator. Landing page. Launch.

F. Monthly Costs at 1K Users (agencies, each with ~10 clients)

Item Cost
AI APIs (GPT-4o-mini ~5M messages) $750
Supabase Pro (higher tier) $75
Fly.io (scaled) $68
Cloudflare R2 (docs storage) $10
Total ~$903/mo

G. Revenue Model

Tier Price Target
Starter $49/mo 1 brand, 1K chats/mo
Agency $149/mo 5 brands, 10K chats
Enterprise $399/mo Unlimited + custom domain

Conversion: ~5% (agencies have budget). Time to $1K MRR: ~2 months.

H. Top 3 Risks + Mitigation

  1. RAG quality is inconsistent → Default to keyword search fallback; let agencies upload FAQ-style docs that work better than raw PDFs
  2. Agencies churn if end-users don't engage → Include engagement analytics + automated email digests to prove value
  3. Low barrier to entry = fast competition → Focus on agency-specific features (client management, billing, reporting) that pure chatbot tools lack

I. Verdict: BUILD ✅ Simplest technical product of the 5. Multi-tenant CRUD + AI API. Lowest risk.

Summary Ranking

Rank Product Proven MRR 30-Day Feasible Cost/Mo @ 1K Time to $1K MRR Verdict
1 White-Label AI Dashboard $47K ✅ YES ~$903 ~2 months BUILD
2 AI SEO Content Agent $73K ✅ YES ~$189 ~3 months BUILD
3 AI LinkedIn Outreach $128K ✅ YES ~$559 ~2.5 months BUILD
4 AI Sales DM Agent $187K ⚠️ PARTIAL ~$615 ~2 months BUILD (MVP)
5 AI Short Video Generator $95K ⚠️ PARTIAL ~$450 ~2 months BUILD (MVP)

Quick Take

All 5 are BUILD. But if you can only pick one:

  • Fastest path to cash: White-Label AI Dashboard (#1) — simplest tech, agency customers have budget, multi-tenant CRUD is a solved problem
  • Biggest market: AI SEO Content Agent (#2) — every business needs SEO, lowest infra cost, scales beautifully
  • Highest ceiling: AI Sales DM Agent (#4) — $187K MRR proven ceiling, but channel API risk is real

Report generated by Product Engineer | 2026-04-24 | Data: Trend Scout 2026-04-24
